summary: Rebuilt ribbonField as parametric surface ribbons. Created `parametricCurves.ts` with three seeded surface families (helicoid, Möbius strip, torus knot) each exposing `sample(u, v, seed) → {position, normal, tangent}`. Replaced helical band loop in `ribbonField.ts` with parametric surface sampling — bands are v-offset slices with narrow spread along surface normals. Added `aCurveParam` attribute (normalized 0–1 along ribbon length) to `RIBBONFIELD_ATTRIBUTES` in `shaderRegistry.ts`. Created new `parametricRibbon.vert.glsl` with aCurveParam-driven bass wave propagation and treble shimmer, plus `parametricRibbon.frag.glsl` with vCurveParam-based edge glow. All 2151 tests pass (61 ribbon-specific including 36 new US-083 tests), TypeScript compiles cleanly, build succeeds.
